conditions: 3 or more rebound-capable frontcourt/wing players active
At least 2 players projected for 20+ minutes among C/PF/SF rebound roles
Wing rebound prop line is near or above recent median

effect.confidence_adjustment: reduce by one tier unless individual rebound chances remain dominant
effect.card_rule: no parlay inclusion unless post-adjusted hit probability is >= 60%

patches_applied.reason: Deni Avdija projected 7.4 mean / 7.1 median but finished with 3 rebounds as Camara, Clingan, Robert Williams, and Cissoko absorbed board volume.

conditions: Role is dependent on blowout/rotation pattern

effect.primary_action: move from approved to lean-only or no-bet
effect.hard_rule: do not classify as primary edge at -130 or worse unless projected minutes >= 16 or mean clears line by >= 1.5 rebounds

patches_applied.reason: Luke Kornet over 3.5 missed by hook with 3 rebounds in 13 minutes despite prior projection edge. Heavy -159 price made the risk unacceptable.

conditions: Series rotation has shown expansion or instability
Multiple secondary rebound props under consideration

effect.rotation_adjustment: redistribute 0.5 to 1.0 rebounds from secondary wings to bench/hustle/frontcourt players
effect.card_rule: prefer primary single or gameline over multi-player rebound cards

patches_applied.reason: Portland used a fragmented rebound profile in an elimination setting; secondary props carried more volatility than pregame median suggested.

conditions: Low average rebound distance or contested board role
Line within 0.5 to 1.0 of recent median

effect.confidence_adjustment: +0.5 tier when minutes and role are stable
effect.card_rule: preferred single under California execution constraints

patches_applied.reason: Victor Wembanyama projected 12.7 mean / 12.2 median and finished with 14 rebounds in stable 34 minutes.

conditions: Opponent series efficiency is below league-average playoff baseline
Favorite has rim protection or shot quality suppression edge
Team total market remains above model median

effect.mean_adjustment: -1.5 to -3.5 team points when brick profile confirms
effect.confidence_adjustment: thin to playable if line remains >= model median + 1.5

patches_applied.reason: POR finished with 95 points on 35.1% FG and 23.4% from three after attempting 47 threes. POR TT under 101.5 hit despite being labeled thin.

global_execution_rules_updated.secondary_rebound_props: must clear >= 60% post-patch probability or remain lean-only
global_execution_rules_updated.bench_big_rebounds: price worse than -130 requires stronger minutes or mean clearance
global_execution_rules_updated.multi_leg_cards: avoid stacking correlated rebound overs when team rebound distribution is congested
global_execution_rules_updated.preferred_california_execution: single-bet priority on clean center-local rebound or team total edge
